download_title: Download HD Client | WotLK HD Client

index.title_line2: Now with a completely new look
index.hero_desc: Graphical enhancements for the original 3.3.5a client: updated textures, remastered visual effects, and enhanced creature and weapon models. The world you know — like never before.
index.comparison_lead: Drag the divider to compare the original and enhanced graphics in different locations.

footer.note1: WotLK HD Client - Non-commercial project · Not affiliated with Blizzard Entertainment
footer.note2: World of Warcraft® is a trademark of Blizzard Entertainment

patches.hero_desc: Below are the patches added to HD Client. With a detailed description and images.

download.hero_desc: Choose a version and a convenient way to download.
download.stable_desc: Recommended for most users. A stable, tested version with no known critical bugs.
download.beta_desc: Version for testers and enthusiasts. Includes patches currently under development and experimental improvements.
download.beta_warn: The beta version includes new features and fixes that have not yet been included in the stable release. It may contain bugs, visual glitches, or incompatibilities. It is not recommended for primary use.

cps.info_banner: The list is formed automatically through the |GitHub API|. Community patches are not checked by WoW HD Client — install them at your own risk.
